description:
Resolve all defects found in the Deep Audit v2 for `hx-spinner`.
Source: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-spinner/AUDIT.md`

**Summary:** 13 defects — 2 P0, 5 P1, 6 P2, 0 P3

### P0 — Critical
- [ ] [P0] 1: Dual announcement — `aria-label` + visually-hidden inner text create double read
- [ ] [P0] 2: No decorative mode — spinner cannot be silenced when adjacent text exists

Reference the AUDIT.md in the component directory for full details and code locations.
title: Audit Fix: hx-spinner
